title: Tibanna tapper
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Tibanna}}
A '''Tibanna tapper''' was a person who stole [[Tibanna/Legends|Tibanna]] gas. [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Zekk]] stopped some Tibanna tappers on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] who were using a [[Spacetug/Legends|tug]] and three [[siphoning balloon]]s in [[36 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
